description_long: This object is a slender, elongated knife or short sword with a straight, narrow blade that appears metallic and reflective. The blade is flanked by a simple, straight handle on each end, with the handles featuring a subtle color accent—one with a pinkish hue and the other with a more neutral tone. The central blade section is silvery and slightly translucent, suggesting a polished or lightly frosted metal, possibly stainless steel or a similar alloy. The handles are minimalistic, lacking any pronounced ergonomic shaping or guard, and are likely made of plastic or composite material. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or decorative features. The object is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld use in kitchen or utility contexts.
description: A slim, straight-bladed knife or short sword with a metallic blade and simple, color-accented handles at each end. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the blade and both handles, with the pink accent on the left handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the blade and the alignment of the handles, emphasizing the object's slenderness.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the blade and both handles, but with less color detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the blade's thinness and the subtle color on the right handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, minimalistic, plastic with color accent
